summary: Added a light time bridge into the state-dinner opening and revised the final handoff line so Chapter 3 can carry the trust-betrayal beat without repetition.
edits: Added a few-days-later time marker to the opening sentence to align the Chapter 1 to Chapter 2 transition with continuity timing.
Changed the final line to frame the lie as becoming official record instead of repeating the trust-focused handoff already present in Chapter 3.
